Yeh job un logon ke liye best hai jo security force me career banana chahte hain aur stable government job ke saath salary, allowances aur future growth chahte hain.
recruitment-body: Secretariat Security Force (SSF) ek government security organization hai jo central government ke important buildings, offices aur institutions ki security ka kaam karta hai. Is recruitment ke madhyam se naye candidates ko recruit kiya jayega jinko training ke baad duty di jayegi aur unhe security management, surveillance aur protection ka kaam karna hoga.
qualification: Candidate ko kisi recognized board se minimum 10th pass hona zaruri hai. Saath hi trade ke hisaab se practical knowledge hona chahiye jaise barber ya washerman ka kaam aana chahiye. Experienced candidates ko selection me advantage mil sakta hai.
job-location: All India – Selected candidates ko different government offices aur security units me posting di jayegi jahan unhe security aur support services provide karni hongi.
job-type: Government Job (Security Force – Permanent Type with Benefits)
job-salary: ₹21,700 – ₹69,100 per month (Pay Level 3) + DA, HRA, TA, Medical, Uniform Allowance aur other government benefits
exam-mode: Physical Test + Written Exam + Trade Test (Offline/Field Based)
payment-method-one: Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI, Wallet
age-relation: OBC candidates ko 3 saal aur SC/ST candidates ko 5 saal ki age relaxation milegi as per government rules.
eligibility-one: Candidate ko 10th pass hona zaruri hai aur uske paas basic education qualification hona chahiye. Kisi recognized board se certificate hona mandatory hai.
eligibility-two: Trade ke hisaab se skill hona chahiye jaise barber ke liye hair cutting aur washerman ke liye washing ka kaam aana chahiye. Practical knowledge important hai.
eligibility-three: Candidate physically fit hona chahiye kyunki selection process me physical test aur medical test hota hai jo pass karna zaruri hai.
salary-two: DA, HRA, TA aur medical facilities alag se milti hain
salary-three: Total annual salary ₹3 lakh se ₹5 lakh tak ho sakti hai allowances ke saath
banefits-1: Government job security aur permanent nature ka kaam
subject-1-topics: Basic GK, current affairs aur static knowledge
subject-4-topics: Barber aur washerman se related practical knowledge
exam-pattern-one: Physical Efficiency Test (PET) aur Physical Standard Test (PST)
exam-pattern-two: Written Exam basic level ka hota hai
exam-pattern-three: Trade Test practical based hota hai
exam-pattern-four: Final selection document verification aur medical ke baad hota hai
how-to-apply-one: Official website par visit kare aur recruitment section open kare jahan SSF Constable form available hoga
how-to-apply-two: Apply Online par click karke registration kare aur apni basic details fill kare
how-to-apply-three: Application form me personal, educational aur trade details dhyan se fill kare
how-to-apply-four: Required documents upload kare jaise photo, signature aur certificates
how-to-apply-five: Application fee pay kare agar applicable ho
how-to-apply-six: Form submit karke print out nikal le future ke liye
document-two: 10th Marksheet (Date of Birth Proof aur qualification proof)
document-three: Recent Passport Size Photograph (Clear aur recent hona chahiye)
document-six: Valid ID Proof (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID)
document-ten: Active Mobile Number aur Email ID
faq-one: SSF Constable 2026 last date kya hai?
faq-one-para: SSF Constable Recruitment 2026 ke liye apply karne ki last date 28 April 2026 hai.
faq-two-para: Candidate ko 10th pass hona zaruri hai aur trade knowledge hona chahiye.
faq-three-para: ₹21,700 se ₹69,100 per month tak salary milti hai allowances ke saath.
faq-four-para: Physical test, written exam, trade test aur medical verification ke through selection hota hai.
faq-five-para: Total 10 posts available hain tradesman category me.
selection-method-five: Medical Examination aur Final Merit List
work-in-job-post-one: Government buildings ki security aur protection karna hota hai jahan sensitive information aur offices hote hain.
work-in-job-post-answer-one: Constable ko entry gate par checking karni hoti hai aur unauthorized entry rokni hoti hai.
work-in-job-post-two: Visitors aur staff ka verification karna aur entry-exit control maintain karna.
work-in-job-post-answer-two: Security register maintain karna aur suspicious activity par nazar rakhna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-three: Regular patrol aur duty shifts me kaam karna jisme day aur night shifts dono hoti hain.
work-in-job-post-answer-three: Assigned area me security round lagana aur safety ensure karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-four: Emergency situations ko handle karna jaise fire, theft ya security breach.
work-in-job-post-answer-four: Quick response dena aur higher authority ko inform karna hota hai.
work-in-job-post-five: Team ke saath coordination aur reporting ka kaam karna.
work-in-job-post-answer-five: Daily report banana aur senior officers ko submit karna hota hai.

title: Punjab & Sind Bank LBO Recruitment 2026 Apply Online – 1000 Vacancy, Eligibility, Salary ₹48,480–₹85,920, Last Date 20 April
description: Punjab and Sind Bank LBO Recruitment 2026 notification out for 1000 Local Bank Officer posts. Check complete details including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, exam pattern, selection process, documents required and apply online link.
keywords: Punjab Sind Bank LBO 2026, PSB LBO Recruitment 2026 apply online, bank jobs 2026, graduate bank job India, LBO vacancy 2026, banking exam notification 2026, Punjab Sind Bank recruitment
job-heading: Punjab & Sind Bank LBO Recruitment 2026 Online Form
introduction: Punjab & Sind Bank dwara Local Bank Officer (LBO) Recruitment 2026 ka official notification jari kar diya gaya hai. Yeh recruitment banking sector me career banana chahne wale candidates ke liye ek bahut hi badi opportunity hai. Is recruitment ke tahat 1000 vacancies nikali gayi hain jo Junior Management Grade Scale-I (JMGS-I) ke pad ke liye hain. Candidates jo graduate hain aur banking job ki tayari kar rahe hain, unke liye yeh ek golden chance hai jisme attractive salary, job security aur career growth ke kaafi opportunities milte hain.
recruitment-body: Punjab & Sind Bank ek reputed public sector bank hai jo Government of India ke under operate karta hai. Yeh recruitment bank ke alag-alag branches ke liye conduct ki ja rahi hai jahan selected candidates ko Local Bank Officer ke roop me appoint kiya jayega aur unhe banking operations, customer service aur financial activities handle karni hongi.
qualification: Candidate ke paas kisi bhi recognized university se graduation degree honi chahiye. Kisi specific stream ki requirement nahi hai, lekin commerce, finance ya banking background wale candidates ko advantage mil sakta hai.
job-location: All India (State Wise Posting) – Candidates ko unke selected state ke andar hi posting di jayegi jahan unhe local language ka knowledge hona zaruri hai.
job-type: Banking Government Job (Permanent Job with Promotion Benefits)
job-salary: ₹48,480 – ₹85,920 per month + allowances (DA, HRA, TA, Medical, Other Benefits)

exam-mode: Online Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Interview

eligibility-two: Candidate ko local language ka knowledge hona chahiye jahan se wo apply kar raha hai.
eligibility-three: Basic computer knowledge hona zaruri hai kyunki kaam digital banking se related hoga.

banefits-1: Permanent bank job with high security

faq-three-para: Candidate graduate hona chahiye kisi bhi stream se.
